examples: The garter was so bashful, so modest, and thought it was a strange question to answer.
The Order of the Garter is an ancient order of chivalry.
"Don't come so near me," said the garter, "I am not accustomed to it."
She became a member of the Order of Merit, and eventually a Lady of the Garter and a life peer as well.
His family remembers him building a TV set from a kit when he was a kid-and losing a pet garter snake in the house.
